rulings.Case Title: HERSHEL HENRY STRONG VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 5, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Thomas Dee Engineering Company¿s motion for summary judgment: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:45am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)
